div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: async peel OWN, activate(fwd_and_out) — else L118

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: async peel OWN, activate(send_out) — if is_last_pe L113

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: cycles_left==0, PE goes idle (all N_CHUNKS seeds drained)

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: init — async-recv 1 ready sentinel from HT_head col0, then arm main

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: main — peel OWN B off shared src_q FIFO, branch on is_last_pe

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: fwd_and_out — non-last PE: emit own east + forward remainder south

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: send_out — last PE: emit own block east only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: next_cycle — join both microthreads, decrement cycles_left, re-arm or idle

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
comptime block(next_cycle) at L162 on non-last PE.
Per-chunk join: the south forward unblock(next_cycle)
+ the east emit activate(next_cycle) must BOTH land
(last PE: single activate from send_out). Then
cycles_left -= 1; if >0 re-block the gate (L144) and
activate(main) to consume the next host X-seed (β
host-gated chunked decode). N_CHUNKS = ceil(MAX_OUTPUT_LEN
/ draft_len); N_CHUNKS==1 == the single-shot path.
